properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, it was You who created the heavens Lord, it was Your hands that put the stars in their place Lord, it is Your voice that commands the morning Even oceans and their waves bow at Your feet

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord, who am I compared to Your glory, oh Lord? Lord, who am I compared to Your majesty?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I am Your beloved, Your creation And You love me as I am You have called me chosen, for Your kingdom Unashamed to call me Your own I am Your beloved

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord, it was You who created the heavens Lord, it was Your hand that put the stars in their place Lord, it is Your voice that commands the morning Even oceans and their waves will bow at Your feet

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I am Your beloved, Your creation And You love me as I am You have called me chosen, for Your kingdom Unashamed to call me Your own I am Your beloved, Your creation And You love me as I am You have called me chosen, for Your kingdom Unashamed to call me Your own I am Your beloved
